Translation.Description: This charming metallic popsicle will offer a novel alternative way to break the proverbial ice.
Translation.Provides: Icebreaker Effect - Has a 50% chance of breaking the surface it has just frozen for an additional 4-10 points of damage
Bash- Has a chance equal to the damage done of knocking the victim prone
Crushing Blow - Attack at +1 per Stamina
